content: Database schema for analytics: videos (video_id, client_id, channel_id, user_id, input_type_name, output_type_name, language_name, uploaded_at, processed_at, published_at, published_flag, published_platform, published_url). Summary tables: monthly_processing_summary (client_id, month, total_uploaded, total_created, total_published), monthly_duration_summary (client_id, month, total_uploaded_duration, total_created_duration, total_published_duration), channel_processing_summary, user_processing_summary, input_type_processing_summary, output_type_processing_summary, language_processing_summary, channel_wise_publishing_counts, channel_wise_publishing_duration.
Total Uploaded Volume: Raw amount of long-form and live content entering the system. Count and uploaded hours summed across all clients from monthly_processing_summary and monthly_duration_summary.

Monthly processing totals (uploaded, processed, published): Sep, 2025: uploaded 3460, processed 8769, published 36; Oct, 2025: uploaded 4279, processed 9716, published 188; Nov, 2025: uploaded 4829, processed 11676, published 80; May, 2025: uploaded 2838, processed 11908, published 81; Mar, 2025: uploaded 7013, processed 23439, published 36; Jun, 2025: uploaded 3197, processed 10453, published 88; Jul, 2025: uploaded 2789, processed 10272, published 29; Jan, 2026: uploaded 5318, processed 15460, published 253; Feb, 2026: uploaded 7165, processed 25467, published 207; Dec, 2025: uploaded 2621, processed 8470, published 152; Aug, 2025: uploaded 3329, processed 8421, published 141; Apr, 2025: uploaded 5776, processed 14211, published 511

Client processing summary (top by published): CLT006: uploaded 30675, processed 77826, published 1007; CLT007: uploaded 11940, processed 40012, published 603; CLT004: uploaded 13814, processed 32340, published 458; CLT003: uploaded 4670, processed 15139, published 167; CLT001: uploaded 4453, processed 14914, published 111; CLT002: uploaded 2750, processed 10558, published 65

Top channels by published count: F (CLT006): 128 published; Q (CLT006): 99 published; A (CLT003): 96 published; A (CLT006): 86 published; C (CLT006): 77 published; A (CLT004): 74 published; G (CLT006): 72 published; B (CLT007): 71 published; A (CLT001): 71 published; N (CLT006): 67 published; O (CLT007): 65 published; R (CLT004): 64 published; Q (CLT007): 63 published; O (CLT006): 63 published; N (CLT007): 61 published
Published duration by platform (hours): YouTube: 19.9h; Instagram: 16.7h; X: 16.4h

Output type usage (created, published): Key moments: created 56676, published 520; Full package: created 40362, published 506; My Key moments: created 17894, published 461; Summary: created 15384, published 157; Chapters: created 21705, published 73
